Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Investment in NimbusTech Instruments Limited (listed on NSE and BSE; CIN: L28999MH2020PLC123456), by Cloudpeak Ventures LLP (LLPIN: BCF-7891).
Structure: Preferential allotment of 18% fully paid equity shares at INR 212 per share under SEBI ICDR Regulations, 2018; post-issue holding subject to open-offer exemptions not being triggered.
Use of Proceeds: Capex for Phase-II sensor line at Plot A-17, Sector 21, Navi Parava, Maharashtra 410501 and working capital.
Conditions Precedent: board and shareholder approvals, NSE/BSE in-principle approvals, SEBI observation letter, KYC completion, DPDPA-compliant notices/consents for all natural-person data processed in onboarding.
Target Identifiers: GSTIN 27AABCN9999Q1Z8; PAN AABCN9999Q; Registered office: 5th Floor, Block E-19, Technopark Enclave, Pune 411045; corporate email: cs@nimbustech.in; website: www.nimbustech.in.
Investor Identifiers: Cloudpeak Ventures LLP, PAN QTTPS1234Z (invalid checksum example, not for filing), address: 302, Coral Arch, Palm Grove Road, Bengaluru 560050; contact: dealdesk@cloudpeak.vc; phone: +91 98100 23456.
Escrow & Payment: Escrow Account No. 004311234567 with Zybanka India Ltd., Fort, Mumbai; IFSC ZYBK0001234; payment on T+2 after signing and satisfaction of CPs.
Signatory & KYC: Mr. Raghav Mehta (CFO, NimbusTech), email raghav.mehta@nimbustech.in, phone +91 98765 44021; Passport R1234568; Aadhaar 1234 5678 9012 (placeholder, checksum invalid; not to be submitted).
Data Protection: Each Party will issue a DPDPA-compliant notice specifying purpose, retention, and grievance officer contacts; no personal data of children (under 18 years) will be collected; if later required for any customer KYC, verifiable parental consent will be obtained before processing.
UPSI/SEBI PIT: Parties acknowledge that draft Q4 results and unannounced vendor contracts constitute UPSI; trading window closure applies from signing until 48 hours after public disclosure to NSE/BSE; only “need-to-know” access; pre-clearance required from the Compliance Officer.
Confidentiality & Clean Team: a clean team will review supplier pricing models; emails circulating UPSI must use the restricted alias upsi_circle@nimbustech.in; do not transmit UPSI over public channels or to role-only addresses outside the clean team.
Helpline Bait (not a contact for this deal): public emergency number 112 and child helpline 1098 must not be used for transaction queries.
KYC Form Placeholders (do not fill here): Name: __________; Address: __________; PAN: __________; Aadhaar: __________; Bank A/c No.: __________.
Long Stop & Signatures: Long stop date 31 January 2027; governing law: India; jurisdiction: Mumbai; signed for NimbusTech Instruments Limited by Company Secretary and Authorised Signatory; signed for Cloudpeak Ventures LLP by Partner.
